title: Crisp Cultured Norwegian Bread Toast
description: A crispy and flavorful Norwegian dish featuring stale bread, yuzu-cure, and low-fat ingredients, perfect for a snack or light meal. This recipe is low-fat-friendly and incorporates cultured ingredients for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the stale bread into 1/2-inch thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread slices and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yuzu juice and cultured buttermilk.
Brush the yuzu-buttermilk mixture over the toasted bread slices.
Sprinkle the grated low-fat cheese over the bread slices.
Return the bread to the oven and bake for an additional 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the bread from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh dill.
Serve the Crisp Cultured Norwegian Bread Toast warm and enjoy.
